name: ComposioHQ/agent-orchestrator
summary: Plugin-based orchestration control plane that isolates each coding task in its own worktree and routes CI or review reactions back through configurable runtime, tracker, and notifier slots.
evidence: Uses isolated git worktrees plus reaction rules like `ci-failed` and `changes-requested` to send follow-up work back into the same session.
Implements Codex as a real agent plugin inside a broader control plane with pluggable runtime, workspace, tracker, SCM, notifier, and terminal slots.
